calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Regarding Insurance Company Of The West???S Application For Default Judgment Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 585(D) (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion regarding insurance company of the west's application for default judgment pursuant to code of civil procedure section 585(d).

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:28:44 a.m. and concluding at 11:05:35 a.m.

Plaintiff Insurance Company of the West represented by Teresa L. Polk, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Fortson Floors, Inc. not appearing.

KIM GRANFORS (Surety Recovery Specialist) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B - Payment Invoice
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. A - Standard Workers' Compensation and Employers' Liability Policy

Court examines KIM GRANFROS. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel and its witness, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint and Defendant failed to comply with contract agreement and did not provide renewal, therefore, breaching that agreement.

Court finds 3 year period has not lapsed.
Court grants pre-judgment interest at a rate of 10% for the period of Jul-08-2021 thru Apr-12-2023.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Insurance Company of the West, and against Defendant Fortson Floors, Inc., as follows:

1. Damages: $64,504.00
2. Pre-Judgment Interest: $12,023.01
3. Costs: $661.20

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $76,527.01

Proposed judgment signed as modified.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Continued To Jun-21-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
